title: İtems PvP
description: Improves your visibility in Minecraft, so you can perform better.
body:
This professional PvP resource pack is specifically designed to keep your screen clean and significantly improve your visibility during intense combat. By using smaller and more compact item models, such as short swords and mini ender pearls, you can see your opponents more clearly and react faster. This pack aims to minimize distractions and maximize your field of view. Improve your view, gain a competitive advantage, and improve your game with Mini Items! Please leave a comment if you want more items!
![mini swords , pickaxes , axes , ender pearl and totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc360911f6fa20fd77ab082dc7a63fb28320f15f.png)
